name: Simple Pimples
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cherry tomatoes in cold water and dry gently with paper towels.
2. Ask an adult to use a carrot peeler or sharp knife to core the tomatoes, then drain excess tomato juice.
3. Using a butter knife, fill the holes in the tomatoes with cream cheese spread.
4. Wipe away any excess cream cheese from the outside of the tomatoes using a clean paper towel.
5. Gently squeeze each pimple and arrange them on a serving platter.
